noveltyJustification: All 6 findings were current-code confirmations of the three P0 safety gaps plus path/schema context.
findings: causal-edges.ts still caps and bounds only createdBy === 'auto', so auto-session remains uncapped.
consolidation.ts still caps Hebbian strengthening only for edge.created_by === 'auto'.
insertEdge conflict updates still overwrite strength/evidence/created_by without reading existing created_by, so manual edges remain vulnerable.
memory-retention-sweep.ts still selects and deletes by delete_after only, without tier/pinned fields or protected-tier decisions.
memory_index schema already has tier/pinned/usage fields needed for a localized retention guard.
